data.body: Previous epic 2e8e-72d9 (Incremental Exploration: Split large codebase and web search tasks into bounded sub-tasks, now closed) was intended to break large exploration tasks into smaller sub-tasks via an exploration-decomposition.md protocol. That epic established SINGLE_SOURCE vs MULTI_SOURCE classification and bounded decomposition (1 level), but dispatched to a single exploration agent per sub-question. This bug tracks the gap: even with decomposition, sub-questions are handled sequentially by one agent at a time rather than dispatching multiple exploration agents in parallel. The fix should leverage the existing exploration-decomposition.md protocol but add parallel dispatch of sub-question agents when MULTI_SOURCE classification fires.
